title: Matera Featured in Wharton Fintech Podcast
excerpt: Tune in to the latest Wharton Fintech Podcast episode to hear about Carlos Netto's, Matera CEO, journey from co-founding Matera in the 1980s to the company's pioneering role in enabling
body:
Tune in to the latest Wharton Fintech Podcast episode to hear about Carlos Netto's, Matera CEO, journey from co-founding Matera in the 1980s to the company's pioneering role in enabling real-time payments in Brazil, How Matera harnessed Brazil's Pix payment system to grow 4x since 2020, and Matera's recent $100M raise with Warburg Pincus and strategic expansion into the U.S.

Listen to the full podcast [here](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/materas-next-chapter-warburg-pincus-u-s-expansion-and/id1042827113?i=1000674851400).
